Wicker Park (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,001,257Details
International Box Office $8,575,819
Worldwide Box Office $21,577,076
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,467,281 (42.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,598 opening theaters/2,598 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,039,456

Movie Details

International Releases: December 10th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)

Running Time: 114 minutes

Geographical setting: Chicago

Subgenre: Erotic Thriller

Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
